feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can the decision buttons be disabled in a to-do list task tile?
entry.content:
When there is a task in a user's to-do list related to a workflow, is it possible to disable the approve/reject buttons on the tile? We would like to ensure that users are forced to navigate into the detail of the object for approval, rather than have the ability to approve/reject without reviewing the detail.

See image below, we would like to disable approve & reject.

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: How to restrict Credit Release validity
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently configuring Basic Credit Management (Scope Item BD6) in an S/4HANA Public Cloud environment.

I have a specific requirement regarding the validity of a released document (Documented Credit Decision - DCD). I want to ensure that a manual release granted by a credit manager is only valid for the same day. If the document is not processed (e.g., delivered) on the same day, it should be blocked again and require a new credit check/decision the following day.

For testing purposes, I approved a documented credit decision and scheduled a re-check run. Even after two days, the job skips the document for the re-check and the job log displays the following message: " Document has not been checked because the release date is still valid." 

How can this be maintained correctly?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards
Katja

entry.title: Populate the BP Address Comment using API
entry.content:
In S4HANA Public Cloud, I'm trying to create a BP using API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.

However, there is a particular field that I cannot populate due to the field is not available in the API.

This Comment field in the BP Address. 

Can anyone help how to populate this field using API_BUSINESS_PARTNER?

entry.title: MD79 ISSUE "XXL has not been installed correctly!"
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am facing an issue when running transaction MD79 via Fiori.

When I execute MD79 in SAP GUI, it works correctly and the Excel export for PIRs is generated without any issue. However, when I run the same transaction via Fiori, I receive this error message during the export "XXL has not been installed correctly!"

Do you have any idea what could be causing this issue and how it can be resolved?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: How to Product Description in Ship HU Form - Extend the HU form
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a functional requirement to display the product description in the Ship HU form. During our analysis, we identified the following issue:
the product description is not available in the form data source, specifically at the item nodes level.

For this reason, we started an investigation to find a standard or technical solution. However: we did not find any available data source extension for this template, it is not possible to add a custom field, since the only available Business Context is reserved for the Header section: Handling Unit (HANDLINGUNIT).

Therefore, we would appreciate your support in identifying a solution or technical alternative to display the product description in the Ship HU form.

Thank you in advance for your support.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Integration: Shift notes from S/4hana Public Cloud to SAP DM
entry.content: At the moment it is not possible to transfer shift notes from S/4HANA public Cloud to SAP DM. Is there any option to integrate shift notes?

entry.title: "Schedule Billing Creation" Batch job collective billing
entry.content:
Hi.

We are currently using the background job “Schedule Billing Creation” to automatically create billing documents for Sales Scheduling Agreements.

As part of this process, the job creates billing documents for outbound deliveries that have been goods issue posted and are available in the Billing Due List.

However, we are facing an issue where the batch job is combining all outbound deliveries related to a single Sales Scheduling Agreement into one invoice, with each outbound delivery appearing as a line item on the same invoice. This follows the concept of collective billing.

Our requirement is to prevent this behavior. We would like the batch job to create a separate invoice for each outbound delivery.

Could you please advise if there is any configuration available to ensure that this job generates only one invoice per outbound delivery?

I have updated the Billing Settings in the VF04 - Create Billing Documents Fiori app to create separate billing documents for each item in billing due list. But, still it's not working.

entry.title: Just-in-sequence: Sequence Number in POs
entry.content:
Hey,

is it possible to work with sequence numbers in production orders in the public cloud?

Kind regards,

Jana

entry.title: How to change bank account on the invoice form in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a problem with the bank account on the invoice output. The invoice output only shows one specific bank account, even if this account is deactivated in the Manage Bank Accounts app. I set up a different bank account number in the same app that I want to show on the invoice form, but the change didn't show up in the output.
Could you please clarify where exactly I can specify or activate the bank account to be used for the invoice? Alternatively, what settings are required for this?

Thank you in advance for your help.

entry.title: How can i restrict access to custom CDS View Data by Access Control on PFCG in S4HPC
entry.content:
Hi.

I need to restrict access to CDS View Data by Access Control on PFCG in S4HPC.

How can i link Authorization Object with Business Role?

I've created custom CDS View

Also Access Control on PFCG authorization

I also created custom Authorization Object / Field ZVHAOBJ1 / ZVHFLD1. 

Now question: how can i assign Authorization Object ZVHAOBJ1 to particular Business Role to restrict access to CDS View Data for users who DO NOT have this authorization. 

Regards

Vitali

entry.title: INVENTORY VALUTION AT COMPANY CODE LEVEL
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

How to set Inventory valution at Company code level in Public cloud.Add to that in my client there are 10 company codes, i need to set Company code valution for only 1 company code.

Best Regards,

Dinesh

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – How to configure automatic DANFE PDF email sending for NF-e?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (Brazil localization) and I would like to configure the automatic sending of NF-e (DANFE PDF) by email to customers.

Could someone please share:

The standard setup using Output Management (BRF+)

Which Output Types should be used for DANFE PDF email

How to link Email Templates and Output Parameter Determination

Any best practice for automatic PDF sending after billing/NF posting

Is this fully handled by Output Management in Public Cloud or does it require extensibility?

Any step-by-step guidance or standard example would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP GROW - Define Access Sequences & Maintain Condition Tables - Create
entry.content:
¡Hola a todos!
Espero que estén bien.

Estaba trabajando en la configuración de las secuencias de acceso a precios y las tablas de acceso relacionadas para la gestión de precios de venta en SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (Implementación de inquilino CBC - BCS 100).

Después de crear las secuencias de acceso y las tablas, el sistema muestra el siguiente mensaje cuando intenta continuar.

Según mi análisis, la forma habitual de mover este tipo de contenido sería mediante la  aplicación "Exportar Colección de Software"

. Sin embargo, al ejecutarla, aparece un mensaje de advertencia adicional.

Luego intenté incluir los objetos relevantes en una colección de software para poder exportarlos.

Luego de realizar el paso de verificación la opción Exportar  permanece deshabilitada y no es posible completar el proceso.
Dada esta situación, me gustaría confirmar si este comportamiento es previsible en SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition y si existe una alternativa o un enfoque recomendado para gestionar la configuración de la secuencia de acceso a precios entre inquilinos. Agradeceríamos la orientación o el apoyo de SAP para aclarar el procedimiento correcto en este caso. Adjunto las capturas de pantalla correspondientes.

Muchas gracias por su apoyo.

Atentamente,

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud 2602 / Mass Maintenance of Sales Area Texts and Email Notes
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
i have to following two questions regarding the mass maintenance of sales Area Texts and Email Notes and i have combined them because they are related to the same tools:

1. My first questions is about the ability to add a new sales text to existing business partners.
My current workflow is the following:
I start by exporting the data for the relevant business partners including the table KNVV_STXL. In a second step i added a new row with the new text and used the action code I (Insert). The issue i faced is, if I try to import the file in the App F6553A i get a warning that "the Action Code I is not permitted for the table KNVV_STXL".

My question is, is there a another action code that can achieve this ? If not, what is an other way to add Sales Texts to business partners in mass ?

2. The second issue is related to the mass maintenance of email notes. In my research i have so far found out, that these notes are saved in the table ADRT and proably in the field AD_REMARK2. But from what i have seen so far, i am not able to export this table within the app Export Master data - business partners (F6551A). Therefore im also not sure if its possible to insert a new entry for this table with the MDG tools.

My question is, is this table and field out of scope for the MDG processes ? If so, is there an alternative way to maintain it in mass ?

Thank you for all responses
Best regards Lukas

entry.title: WM Monitor queues WMQF* state SYSFAIL with no information abaout the reason
entry.content:
We are using SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud integrated EWM, doing usage decisions for inspection lots with follow-up actions to post quality stock to unrestriceted use stock.

 

At the WM Monitor (/SCWM/MON) queue entries 'Asynchronous execution of Follow Up Action with Retry logic' appear again and again.

First with the message text ' Command to tRFC/qRFC: Execute LUW again', later 'Max number of attempts of RETRY reached'.

When calling the application log, it appears: No display program registered for this queue - Message no. /SCWM/MONITOR055

How can I find out what is causing the faulty queue?

entry.title: Item text is missing in confirmation of requisition
entry.content:
Previously in the items data, business user can still add item text on it but now there is no field for it when we edit it to confirm/create the goods receipt for the PR/PO

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITITION - CONTENT UPGRADE
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

According to the relevant SAP information, my understanding is that after four weeks of the software upgrade, SAP will release the new version of the content upgrade.

  1. Can I understand that the content upgrade contains business process content, meaning that it automatically generates transport requests (TRs) related to business processes, which the functional team will then take over? (Does the content upgrade only contain TRs related to business processes?)

  2. Does the content upgrade have a version? For the next release, is the version of the Content Upgrade 2602?

  3. When SAP upgrades the software version for each system, does it also generate any TRs?

  4. The Hotfix Collection also generates TRs. Does it also have a version, and does it need to be imported into Q and P systems?

  5. Both Hotfix TRs and Content Upgrade TRs are named “BC Upgrade.” How can we differentiate between them?

entry.title: calculate using actual overhead costs in actual cost accounting
entry.content:
I want to calculate using actual overhead costs in actual cost accounting, but I don't know what settings to use.
In standard cost accounting, I have successfully calculated planned overhead costs.
Could you please advise me on the setup method and how to calculate actual overhead costs?

entry.title: Make field read-only in table but editable in Object Page
entry.content:
I have a custom app where in the Object Page, there is section for a table where i can add new business partner.

But I want the fields to be read-only when it is viewed as a table in the Object Page.

I want it to be editable when I access the row into another the BP Object Page.

I already tried using dynamic feature control, but the logic cannot tell whether the app is in table view or in object page view. Need your help on this matter. Thanks!

entry.title: Automatic Batch Determination in OBD for NLN Item Category – Unexpected System Behavior
entry.content:
STO is created manually in S/4HANA between a 3PL plant and an external plant.
After STO creation, the Outbound Delivery (OBD) is generated and re-routed to the 3PL via BTP.
Every process is executed in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Issue

In the Outbound Delivery, the system is automatically populating the batch.
This is not part of the intended design.

The requirement is that the 3PL should have the flexibility to select the batch on their own and perform PGI, and the selected batch details should then be updated back in S/4HANA.

 

As per standard SAP behavior, automatic batch determination happens only when the “Automatic Batch Determination” indicator is enabled for the OBD item category (in this case, NLN).

 

However, even after turning off the Automatic Batch Determination indicator for item category NLN, the system is still proposing a batch in the OBD.

Additionally, in some cases, the system is proposing an older batch with zero available inventory, which is causing further issues.

  • Why is the system still proposing batches in the OBD even after disabling Automatic Batch Determination for item category NLN?
  • Is there any other configuration or standard behavior that could be driving this batch determination?
  • How can we completely stop batch proposal in OBD so that batch selection is done only by the 3PL during PGI?
